title: viola odorata var. floribunda
intro: Viola odorata var. floribunda, also known as sweet violet or wood violet, is a variety of the common violet plant that is characterized by its clusters of small, fragrant flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Viola odorata var. floribunda include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and support the immune system. The plant can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
